---
name: Feature Request / Decision Log
about: Propose a new capability or document an architectural decision
title: 'feat: <short description>'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- What gap or friction does this address? One paragraph. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- What would you build? Be specific about user-facing changes. -->

## Version Impact

<!-- Which SemVer component would this bump? -->
- [ ] PATCH — bug fix, no new behavior
- [ ] MINOR — new feature, backward-compatible
- [ ] MAJOR — breaking change (schema, CLI flags, removed feature)

## Data Schema Impact

<!-- Does this change targets.json, logs/, or meal-plans/ structure? -->
- [ ] No schema change
- [ ] Additive schema change (new optional field)
- [ ] Breaking schema change (renamed/removed field)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What else did you consider and why did you reject it? -->
